overall.description: A static third-person view of a gothic-style circular common room from a video game (resembling Hogwarts Legacy). The scene features stone walls, tall arched windows with purple curtains, and various magical artifacts arranged on wooden tables. A player character enters from the foreground and walks toward an NPC standing near a chalkboard on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle common room with divination study equipment

events.description: player character enters the frame from the bottom foreground and begins walking toward the left side
player character stops walking and stands still near the wooden table on the left side

agents.ego_description: enters from the foreground and walks toward the left side of the room, stopping near a table with magical artifacts next to an NPC

notable_agents.action: standing idle near the chalkboard and wall, facing toward the center of the room

entered.detail: tall arched window with stone frame allowing natural light to enter the room
heavy purple drapes framing the left window, partially drawn to the sides
grey stone block wall with vertical texture forming the back of the room
curved dark leather seating arranged in a circle around the central rug
large decorative rug with intricate patterns covering the center floor area
small wooden table holding various magical objects and books
glowing crystal ball on a stand sitting atop the wooden side table
wooden easel with chalkboard standing against the left wall near the NPC
tall wooden shelving units filled with books and stacked against the right wall
decorative wall hanging with framed art on the left stone wall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static view of a gothic circular common room with stone walls and tall windows draped in purple curtains. Natural light streams in, illuminating the central seating area and ornate rug. A player character enters from the foreground, walks across the room toward the left side where an NPC stands near a chalkboard, and stops by a table holding a glowing crystal ball. The room is sparsely populated, creating a quiet, studious atmosphere typical of a magical academy setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective of a gothic circular common room as a player character traverses the space toward a scholarly encounter. It begins with a wide view of the stone walls and tall windows draped in purple curtains, where natural light illuminates a central seating area and an ornate rug. As the character enters from the foreground, the focus shifts from the quiet, studious atmosphere of the room to their steady progression across the floor. The movement continues toward the left side of the chamber, passing through the light before the character finally comes to a stop beside a table holding a glowing crystal ball near an NPC and a chalkboard.
